package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for gorm_model_hook_calls_service_or_repository: Model hooks that depend on higher-layer services or repositories.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule063NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule063NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule063NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario063Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule063NegativeService, input Rule063NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
